costItems.description: Electric mat – supply & fit per m²
costItems.notes: Add thermostat ~£100–£250. Hydronic (wet) system 3–4x more expensive.
Tile removal more expensive. Includes disposal.
Stainless or composite 1.5 bowl + mixer. Premium Quooker boiling tap £700–£1,200 extra.

costItems.description: Connect new sink / dishwasher – labour only
costItems.notes: UK ~£40–£60/hr; US $80–$130/hr. ~3–6 hrs for new connections.
Moving waste stack expensive. Avoid if possible. US slab: higher.

costItems.description: Gas Safe engineer – connect/alter gas supply
costItems.notes: UK Gas Safe required. US licensed gas fitter. New line from meter much higher.
Oven circuit, extraction, sockets. Full rewire additional £2,000–£5,000.

costItems.description: New 32A circuit for induction hob or double oven
costItems.notes: Required for induction hob in most UK homes. Add to E01 for full reno.
UK £250–£500/day. US $350–$750/day by state. London/NYC premium.
LED strip or puck. Hardwired vs plug-in. Add electrician for hardwired.

costItems.notes: Avg kitchen 6–10 lights. Includes electrician.
Includes pendant over island. All electrician labour included.

Filler, primer, 2 coats. High ceilings/cornice add 20–40%.
